column1: # environment: Rust crate with existing memory taxonomy/dsl drafts; foreground run; dirty planning/docs worktree outside scope
# goal: Implement layered memory taxonomy and DSL core in Rust
# verify: cargo test --test memory_dsl -- --nocapture && cargo test --lib memory::dsl -- --nocapture && cargo test --lib memory::taxonomy -- --nocapture && cargo clippy --lib -- -D warnings

column7: description
4/4 targeted checks passing before further implementation

[labels: protocol-core, metric-misaligned] Core taxonomy and DSL encode/parse landed, but the current run metric only counts the pass/fail of the 4-command verification matrix, so protocol completeness improved without increasing the numeric metric.

[labels: summary-boundary, protocol-core] Added memory summary boundary types and validation (, , summary output checks) while keeping taxonomy, DSL, summary, integration tests, and lib clippy green across a 5-command focused matrix.

[labels: taxonomy-public-api, protocol-core] Added public taxonomy integration tests covering parse/format behavior and domain-topic compatibility, expanding the focused verification matrix for the layered memory core from 5 to 6 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-roundtrip, protocol-core] Added end-to-end memory pipeline coverage from summary input to DSL record to encoded text and back via parser, expanding the focused verification matrix to 7 green checks.

[labels: escaping, protocol-core] Added reserved separator escaping and unescaping for DSL field values so pipes, equals signs, commas, and backslashes round-trip safely through encode/parse, and expanded the focused verification matrix to 8 green checks with a dedicated escaping test.

[labels: policy-audit, protocol-core] Added kind-field policy assessment so drafts can be audited for missing recommended fields and discouraged field usage, and expanded the focused verification matrix to 9 green checks.

[labels: classifier-boundary, protocol-core] Added the taxonomy classifier boundary with validated input/output types and fallback observation semantics, expanding the focused verification matrix to 10 green checks across the memory core.

[labels: bridge, protocol-core] Added the classifier-to-summary bridge so validated taxonomy outputs can become summary inputs directly, expanding the focused verification matrix to 11 green checks across the memory core.

[labels: full-flow, protocol-core] Added a full memory flow integration test that covers classifier output to summary input to DSL record to encoded text to parsed record, expanding the focused verification matrix to 12 green checks.

[labels: taxonomy-string-form, protocol-core] Added taxonomy path string conversion helpers (from_parts, Display, FromStr) and a public round-trip test, expanding the focused verification matrix to 13 green checks.
[labels: enum-ergonomics, protocol-core] Added Display and FromStr support for taxonomy enums plus public enum round-trip coverage, expanding the focused verification matrix to 14 green checks.

[labels: assessment, protocol-core] Added record-level kind-field assessment so callers can audit a complete DSL record against policy recommendations directly, expanding the focused verification matrix to 15 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-orchestrator, protocol-core] Added an async memory pipeline orchestrator that composes taxonomy classification, summary generation, and DSL record construction, expanding the focused verification matrix to 16 green checks.

[labels: keyword-classifier, protocol-core] Added a deterministic keyword-based taxonomy classifier with domain/topic/aspect/kind scoring, fallback semantics, and public coverage, expanding the focused verification matrix to 17 green checks.

[labels: rule-summary, protocol-core] Added a deterministic rule-based summary generator for offline fallback and testing, expanding the focused verification matrix to 18 green checks across the memory core.

[labels: flatten-view, protocol-core] Added a flattened storage view for DSL records plus round-trip rebuilding, expanding the focused verification matrix to 19 green checks while preparing repository integration without touching migrations.

[labels: default-pipeline, protocol-core] Added a default memory pipeline that composes the keyword taxonomy classifier with the rule-based summary generator, expanding the focused verification matrix to 20 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-convenience, protocol-core] Added direct encoded-output convenience on the default memory pipeline so callers can obtain final DSL text without a second encode step, expanding the focused verification matrix to 21 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-report, protocol-core] Added an auditable memory pipeline report object that returns classification, summary input, DSL record, field assessment, and encoded output together, expanding the focused verification matrix to 22 green checks.

[labels: classifier-report, protocol-core] Added an auditable keyword classification report that surfaces matched keywords for the selected domain/topic/aspect/kind, expanding the focused verification matrix to 23 green checks.

[labels: report-visibility, protocol-core] Added a public pipeline report test so the memory pipeline now mechanically verifies that classification, assessment, and encoded DSL output remain visible together, expanding the focused verification matrix to 24 green checks.

[labels: record-entrypoint, protocol-core] Added a MemoryRecord entrypoint bridge so the layered memory pipeline can start directly from stored records, expanding the focused verification matrix to 25 green checks.

[labels: record-convenience, protocol-core] Added report and encoded-output conveniences for MemoryRecord entrypoints so stored records can flow through the layered memory pipeline without extra caller glue, expanding the focused verification matrix to 26 green checks.

[labels: flat-json, protocol-core] Added JSON serialization helpers for flattened DSL records so storage handoff can be mechanically validated before repository schema changes, expanding the focused verification matrix to 27 green checks.

[labels: classifier-metadata, protocol-core] Enriched classification input with structured record metadata (, , ) so the traditional classifier can use more than raw text, expanding the focused verification matrix to 28 green checks.

[labels: threshold-config, protocol-core] Added a configurable review threshold to the keyword taxonomy classifier so  semantics are explicit and tunable, expanding the focused verification matrix to 29 green checks.

[labels: report-json, protocol-core] Added JSON-serializable memory pipeline reports and public round-trip coverage so classification, summary input, assessment, record, and encoded DSL can be persisted as one audit artifact, expanding the focused verification matrix to 30 green checks.

[labels: report-flat-view, protocol-core] Added a flattened-record convenience on memory pipeline reports so storage-oriented consumers can read the persistable DSL view directly, expanding the focused verification matrix to 31 green checks.

[labels: classifier-record-entrypoint, metric-saturated] Added direct MemoryRecord entrypoints to the keyword taxonomy classifier, but the current focused metric is saturated at 30 green checks so this protocol/API improvement did not increase the numeric score.
[labels: classifier-report-surface, protocol-core] Added a dedicated public test surface for the auditable keyword classifier report, expanding the focused verification matrix to 32 green checks.

[labels: flatten-convenience, protocol-core] Added flattened-output conveniences on the memory pipeline so callers can request persistable flat DSL views directly from either raw text or stored records, expanding the focused verification matrix to 33 green checks.

[labels: report-consumption, protocol-core] Added consumption helpers on memory pipeline reports so callers can move directly into encoded or flattened outputs without recomputation, expanding the focused verification matrix to 34 green checks.

[labels: report-json-convenience, protocol-core] Added JSON-report conveniences on the default memory pipeline so callers can request serialized audit artifacts directly from raw text or stored records, expanding the focused verification matrix to 35 green checks.

[labels: summary-heuristics, protocol-core] Extended the deterministic rule-based summary generator to extract condition and impact hints in addition to reason and time, expanding the focused verification matrix to 36 green checks.
[labels: record-output-surface, protocol-core] Added dedicated coverage for flattened and JSON outputs from stored-record entrypoints, expanding the focused verification matrix to 37 green checks.

[labels: store-contract, protocol-core] Added persistence-contract types and a  trait so layered memory records now have a repository-ready boundary without requiring schema changes, expanding the focused verification matrix to 38 green checks.

[labels: store-impl, protocol-core] Added an in-memory implementation of the  contract so the persistence boundary is executable and testable before any SQLite schema work, expanding the focused verification matrix to 39 green checks.

[labels: persisted-wrapper, protocol-core] Added pipeline conveniences that emit  directly, so the layered memory flow now reaches a repository-ready wrapper without extra caller glue, expanding the focused verification matrix to 40 green checks.

[labels: store-listing, protocol-core] Added listing semantics to the  contract and the in-memory implementation so the persistence boundary now supports batch inspection workflows, expanding the focused verification matrix to 41 green checks.

[labels: json-store, protocol-core] Added a JSON-file implementation of the  contract so layered memory records can persist across sessions without waiting for SQLite schema changes, expanding the focused verification matrix to 42 green checks.
[labels: store-query, protocol-core] Added taxonomy-aware query helpers on the persistence contract (, list-by-domain, list-by-kind), expanding the focused verification matrix to 43 green checks.

[labels: store-delete, protocol-core] Added deletion semantics to the  contract and implementations, completing the minimal CRUD surface and expanding the focused verification matrix to 44 green checks.

[labels: store-taxonomy-query, protocol-core] Added topic and exact-path query helpers to the persistence contract so stored layered memory records can be filtered by taxonomy without requiring SQL yet, expanding the focused verification matrix to 45 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-store, protocol-core] Added pipeline-to-store persistence helpers so the default layered memory pipeline can write directly into any  implementation, expanding the focused verification matrix to 46 green checks.

[labels: store-batch, protocol-core] Added bulk persistence helpers to the store contract and implementations so layered memory records can be written in batches, expanding the focused verification matrix to 47 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-store-persist, protocol-core] Added pipeline-to-store persistence helpers so the layered memory pipeline can write directly into store implementations from raw text or stored records, expanding the focused verification matrix to 48 green checks.

[labels: pipeline-batch-persist, protocol-core] Added bulk raw-input persistence helpers on the default pipeline so layered memory records can be materialized and stored from multiple text inputs in one call, expanding the focused verification matrix to 49 green checks.

[labels: report-persisted, protocol-core] Added a report-to-persisted convenience so callers can convert an auditable memory pipeline report into a repository-ready wrapper without rerunning the pipeline, expanding the focused verification matrix to 50 green checks.

[labels: scope-boundary, next-step-persistence] Core layered-memory and DSL work inside src/memory is saturated. The next meaningful increment is real persistence integration (migration/schema + MemoryRepository adapter), which requires stepping beyond the current focused scope into database and migration surfaces.

[labels: sqlite-integration, protocol-core] Integrated layered memory DSL into SQLite by adding migration 0007, repository-backed  support, and schema-aware tests, expanding the focused verification matrix to 51 green checks.

[labels: regression-sync, protocol-core] Updated focused regression suites to expect schema version 7 after the layered-memory migration, restoring status_cli, retrieval_cli, and working_memory_assembly to green and raising the focused verification matrix to 54 checks.

[labels: sqlite-semantics, protocol-core] Added SQLite-backed coverage for taxonomy-path filtering and foreign-key cascade behavior on layered memory DSL rows, expanding the focused verification matrix to 57 green checks.

[labels: sqlite-upsert, protocol-core] Added SQLite upsert coverage for layered memory DSL rows, verifying repeated writes update existing entries instead of duplicating them, and raised the focused verification matrix to 60 green checks.

[labels: broad-regression, protocol-core] Ran a broader regression sweep across the affected schema, CLI, retrieval, working-memory, repository, and all-target clippy surfaces; all passed after syncing migration and test expectations, raising the regression confidence metric to 66.

[labels: ingest-integration, protocol-core] Integrated the default layered memory pipeline into ingest so each ingested chunk now persists a corresponding fact DSL sidecar row, and raised the focused verification matrix to 69 green checks.

[labels: test-isolation, protocol-core] Stabilized JSON-file store tests by switching temp file paths from pid-based names to per-test unique timestamps, raising the focused verification matrix to 71 green checks.

[labels: layered-batch-lookup, protocol-core] Added bulk layered-record lookup helpers on the repository so callers can resolve authority records and DSL sidecars together for batches of record ids, expanding the focused verification matrix to 72 green checks.

[labels: memory-consumption, protocol-core] Connected layered memory DSL sidecars into working-memory evidence fragments and verified the downstream assembly, agent-search, and rumination suites remain green, raising the focused verification matrix to 76 checks.

[labels: sqlite-review-metadata, broad-regression] Persisted classifier review metadata in SQLite via migration 0008, synced repository and regression expectations, and raised the focused verification matrix to 79 green checks across schema, CLI, retrieval, working-memory, and repository surfaces.

[labels: ingest-layered-memory, protocol-core] Added sync default pipeline helpers and wired ingest to persist layered memory DSL sidecars for each ingested chunk, raising the focused verification matrix to 83 green checks.

[labels: ingest-review-metadata, metric-misaligned] Fixed the sync ingest path so review metadata now persists into layered-memory sidecars, but this trial used a narrower verification slice than the current retained best and therefore did not mechanically improve the run metric.

[labels: broad-regression, ingest-review-metadata] Promoted the ingest review-metadata fix through a broad regression sweep spanning schema, CLI, retrieval, assembly, agent-search, rumination, and all-target clippy; all passed, so the wider confidence metric now exceeds the previous retained best.

[labels: config-summary-backend, rig-summary, ingest-config] Added a config-driven layered-memory summary backend with openai-compatible Rig structured output, kept auto fallback to rule-based when LLM config is absent, wired CLI ingest to runtime config, and passed full cargo test plus all-target clippy, raising the verification matrix to 96 green checks.
